title: 주택도시보증공사_분양이력정보
license_basis: Public Data Portal entry shows 이용허락범위 제한 없음.
redistribution_policy: API/table records may be used subject to portal and provider terms. Keep provenance and do not mix with unlicensed private materials.
notes: Contains business site name, household count, sale price, region, announcement approval date, sale start date, and guarantee issue date fields.

v0.2_acquisition.data_acquisition_blocker: Bulk records require a data.go.kr serviceKey bound to a registered IP. No key available in this environment; only the API spec/metadata page was acquired. Raw rows NOT downloaded.
v0.2_acquisition.note: 메타데이터만 취득. 실데이터(행)는 키/포털 게이트로 미취득.
